motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def shortestPalindrome(self, s: str) -> str:
        rev_s = s[::-1]
        for i in range(len(s)):
            if s.startswith(rev_s[i:]):
                return rev_s[:i] + s
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
